# Voxengo Free Reverb Impulse Responses

These 38 impulse responses are © Aleksey Vaneev (Voxengo), distributed
royalty-free under the terms in [`license.txt`](license.txt). They were
created with Voxengo's *Impulse Modeler*.

- **Source:** <https://www.voxengo.com/impulses/>
- **Original archive:** `IMreverbs.zip` (not committed; extract from the
  source URL above to obtain the unmodified pack).
- **Format:** 44.1 kHz / 16-bit / stereo WAV, all files unaltered.

By using these files (whether bundled with Doobie or extracted from this
distribution) you acknowledge that Aleksey Vaneev retains exclusive
ownership of these impulse files including all intellectual property
rights therein, at all times.

These impulses are **not** covered by Doobie's GPL-3.0 license — they
remain Aleksey Vaneev's property under the terms in `license.txt`.
They are aggregated with Doobie but are not a derivative work of it
(mere aggregation, in GPL-3.0 terms).
